column1: # Each row is a single path string.
# match   = leading path component is exactly one of /etc /sys /proc /boot /dev
# nomatch = leading component is not one of those system directories
# Bare system prefixes and paths beneath them.
# Lookalikes: the system name is only a prefix of the leading component,
# underscore is a word char, so /etc_foo's leading component is etc_foo, not /etc.
# Relative paths: no leading slash, so no system component.
